## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `npm start` and the game still loads and plays
- [ ] I ran `npm run build` and it succeeded
- [ ] No new `console.log`, `debugger`, or commented-out code
- [ ] I updated `README.md` / `CHANGELOG.md` if behavior changed
- [ ] I added myself to Credits if this is my first PR (optional)
